title: Gaming Audit Interpretation
description: Schema for interpreting raw audit results and mapping them to plain-language recommendations.

category.description: The category of the recommendation, e.g. timer-holder, graphics-flags, background-load, etc.

action.description: Concise description of the action or recommendation (e.g. 'Enable Game Mode').

status.description: Interpretation of the audit result.  It indicates whether the current system state matches, deviates or conflicts with the recommended setting.

severity.description: How critical the recommendation is for performance/latency.

recommendation.description: Plain-language guidance to the user explaining what to do if the status is not 'applied'.

rollback.description: Instructions on how to undo the recommendation if necessary.
